authValidation.passwordUppercase: Must contain at least 1 uppercase letter
authValidation.newPasswordMustBeDifferent: New password must be different from current password
authValidation.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 1 character
authValidation.firstNameMax: First name must be less than 255 characters
authValidation.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 1 character
authValidation.lastNameMax: Last name must be less than 255 characters
authValidation.nameMinCharacters: Name must be at least 3 characters
authValidation.nameMaxCharacters: Name must be less than 50 characters
authValidation.nameRegex: Name must only contain letters and spaces
authValidation.phoneMin: Phone number must be at least 12 numbers
